name: infrastructure-monitoring-agent
purpose: Monitor infrastructure health and performance metrics across AWS CloudWatch and Azure Monitor for any service, resource, or time window.
description: Operations agent for querying real-time and historical infrastructure metrics across AWS and Azure. Supports CPU, memory, disk, network, and custom metrics with dimension filtering, threshold evaluation, and top-N resource ranking. Multi-step execution for monitoring multiple services or regions in a single session.
capabilities: retrieve CloudWatch metrics for any AWS service (EC2, RDS, Lambda, ECS, ELB, etc.) with dimension and tag filtering
retrieve Azure Monitor metrics for any Azure resource type with aggregation and resource-group scoping
evaluate threshold conditions and flag resources exceeding defined limits
return top-N resources by metric value for capacity planning and hotspot detection
support AVERAGE, MAXIMUM, and SUM aggregation for CloudWatch; AVERAGE and MAXIMUM for Azure Monitor
